name: Remington
description_short: Remington is a firearms and ammunition manufacturer, not a financial services or payday-alternative lender. This company has been miscategorized on CreditDoc.
description_long: Remington Firearms is a legacy American gun manufacturer with roots dating back to 1816, when Eliphalet Remington II handcrafted rifle barrels at his father's forge in Utica, New York. The company expanded significantly through government contracts during the Civil War era and evolved into one of America's oldest continuously operating firearms makers. In recent years, Remington Firearms and Remington Ammunition separated into two distinct entities under different ownership structures. Remington Firearms (operating as RemArms, LLC under license of trademarks owned by Ammunition Operations, LLC) manufactures rifles, shotguns, and tactical firearms for civilian, law enforcement, and defense markets. The company produces bolt-action rifles (Model 700, Model 783), pump-action and autoloading shotguns (Model 870, V3 series), and specialized tactical platforms. RemArms has announced expansion of its global headquarters and advanced manufacturing facility to LaGrange, Georgia, signaling reinvestment in domestic production. Remington Firearms is distinguished by its heritage, iconic product lines with multi-generational brand recognition, and specialization in precision rifle platforms and shotgun engineering. The company maintains separate operations from Remington Ammunition and directs consumer inquiries through dedicated departments. There is no factual basis for categorizing this company as a payday-alternative lender, personal loan provider, or any other financial services entity. This is a manufacturing business focused entirely on firearms production and sales.
services: Manufacture and sale of bolt-action rifles (Model 700, Model 783)
Manufacture and sale of pump-action shotguns (Model 870 series with multiple configurations)
Manufacture and sale of autoloading shotguns (V3 Field Pro, 1100)
Tactical and home defense firearm variants
Law enforcement and military-spec firearms and platforms
Precision long-range rifle platforms (Model 700 Long Range)
Authorized armorer training and instruction programs
Consumer customer service for firearm inquiries (844-REMARMS)
pros: Historic American brand with 200+ years of firearms manufacturing heritage and established market credibility
Iconic product lines like the Model 870 shotgun and Model 700 rifle with proven reliability across generations
Investing in domestic manufacturing expansion with new advanced facility and R&D center in LaGrange, Georgia
Produces firearms for diverse markets: civilian hunters, sport shooters, law enforcement, and defense applications
Offers specialized products including precision long-range platforms (Model 700 Long Range) and tactical variants
cons: This company is a firearms manufacturer, not a financial services provider—it does not belong in a consumer finance database
Website provides limited consumer service information; firearms sales typically require licensed dealers and background checks
Separated ammunition and firearms operations may create confusion about product availability and customer support channels
No information provided about warranty, customer support responsiveness, or product reliability metrics
best_for: Lower fees and better loan rates than banks
diagnosis: Remington Firearms is a firearms manufacturer, not a financial services company. It should be removed from CreditDoc entirely as it provides no consumer lending, credit products, or payday-alternative services. The categorization as a 'payday-alternatives' lender is factually incorrect and misleading.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
